headline: Morgan Stanley Raises Amgen (AMGN) Price Target Following a Strong Start for Uplizna
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 2.85%, Amgen Inc. (NASDAQ:AMGN) is included among the 12 High Yield Fortune 500 Stocks to Buy Now. Amgen Inc. (NASDAQ:AMGN) discovers, develops, manufactures, and delivers innovative medicines to fight some of the world’s toughest diseases. headline: Amgen Faces Dual Turning Point With IMDYLLTRA Gain And Tavneos Risk
summary: European Commission approves Amgen’s IMDYLLTRA for extensive stage small cell lung cancer, opening a new targeted immunotherapy option for patients in the region. FDA proposes withdrawing Tavneos from the U.S. market over data integrity and safety concerns, including reports of patient deaths. Amgen, NasdaqGS:AMGN, initiates an independent review with the Duke Clinical Research Institute to respond to the FDA’s findings and protect its autoimmune franchise. For investors watching...
